steps.t: Thurferth is near the centre of Woodhurst. Herubrand told you to speak with Thurferth, Captain of the Guard, about the two men posted at the Mead Hall…
Thurferth suggested other guards posted around the city may be able to help.
Thurferth is near the centre of Woodhurst. You should tell Thurferth of what you learned from the guards around town.
